query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scheduled_compliance_checks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  check_type ENUM('daily_threshold', 'weekly_digest', 'escalation_check', 'reminder_processing') NOT NULL,
  cron_expression VARCHAR(100),
  interval_minutes INT,
  last_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  last_run_status ENUM('success', 'partial', 'failed'),
  last_run_duration INT,
  last_run_results JSON,
  next_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  is_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  config JSON,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  check_type ENUM('daily_threshold', 'weekly_digest', 'escalation_check', 'reminder_processing') NOT NULL,
  cron_expression VARCHAR(100),

  last_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  last_run_status ENUM('success', 'partial', 'failed'),

  last_run_results JSON,
  next_run_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  is_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  config JSON,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
